	80 Plus GOLD Efficiency with Digital Control IC: Certified for more than 90% efficiency at typical loads in 115V testing.
	Wave Heatsink Design: Designed to guide internal airflow and improve heat dissipation inside the PSU for better temperature management under load.

	RTX 50 Series Ready: ATX 3.1 and native GPU connectivity ready for today's most demanding graphics cards.

Built with high-quality, reliable components including Japanese 105°C capacitors and an extensive 10-year warranty.
